entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop sensitive to iron deficiency in alkaline and calcareous soils

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY CHLOROSIS
entities.description: A condition characterized by leaf yellowing due to iron deficiency that reduces growth and yield

entities.name: ALKALINE SOILS
entities.description: Soils with high pH that contribute to iron deficiency in plants

entities.name: CALCAREOUS SOILS
entities.description: Soils rich in calcium carbonate that contribute to iron deficiency in plants

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and increase in size of the plant

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural production of the crop

entities.name: VISUAL CHLOROSIS RATING
entities.description: A qualitative assessment of leaf yellowing used to measure IDC

entities.name: SPAD CHLOROPHYLL METER READING
entities.description: A quantitative measurement of chlorophyll content in leaves

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll present in the plant tissues

entities.name: ACTIVE IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of Fe2+ in the plant

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant used as a productivity trait

entities.name: NUMBER OF PRIMARY BRANCHES
entities.description: The count of main branches on the plant used as a productivity trait

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The count of pods produced by a single plant used as a productivity trait

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The weight of pods harvested per unit area used as a productivity trait

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENT
entities.description: The ratio of seed weight to pod weight used as a productivity trait

entities.name: 100 SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of one hundred seeds used as a productivity trait

entities.name: HAULM YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the vegetative part of the plant used as a productivity trait

entities.name: FE-SUPPLEMENTED CONDITION
entities.description: Experimental state where iron is applied to the soil

entities.name: FE-NON-SUPPLEMENTED CONDITION
entities.description: Experimental state where no iron is applied to the soil

entities.name: G 2-52
entities.description: A recently released groundnut variety with moderate IDC tolerance and high yield potential
